canonical_solution: module json_counter(input logic clk, en, output logic [2:0] q); always_ff @(posedge clk) if (en) q <= q + 3'd1; endmodule
testbench: module tb; logic clk, en; logic [2:0] q; json_counter dut(.*); endmodule

canonical_solution: module missing_prompt(input logic a, output logic y); assign y = a; endmodule
module json_shift(input logic clk, d, output logic [1:0] q); always_ff @(posedge clk) q <= {q[0], d}; endmodule
